description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/testing:ubuntu-xenial-python36 for all jobs and defines the stages build and deploy. In the build stage add a style_check job that runs pycodestyle primitive_interfaces. Also in build add a tests job that runs docker info in a before_script, then executes python3 setup.py sdist, pip3 install --process-dependency-links dist/*, rm -rf primitive_interfaces, and python3 ./run_tests.py; it uses the docker:dind service and sets the variables DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375 and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive. Also in build add a type_check job that runs git clone https://gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/metadata.git, cd metadata, git checkout ${DEPENDENCY_REF}, cd .., and MYPYPATH=metadata mypy primitive_interfaces, defining the variable DEPENDENCY_REF=devel. In the deploy stage add a trigger_images_rebuild job that runs only on the devel branch and executes a conditional curl command if [ -n "$TRIGGER_TOKEN" ]; then curl -X POST -F token=$TRIGGER_TOKEN -F ref=master -F variables[REBUILD_IMAGE]=core:ubuntu-xenial-python36-devel https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/5024100/trigger/pipeline; fi to trigger a downstream pipeline, using the secret TRIGGER_TOKEN.
